scores.correctness_notes: The gold standard focuses on the data schema (application-data/unit-data fields) and notes the Python API is in the traefik-k8s-operator repo rather than charmlibs docs. The agent skips the schema entirely and jumps straight to Python API. IngressPerAppRequirer is acknowledged in the gold standard as existing, so the core class is correct, but the answer misses the contract specification focus.
scores.hallucination_notes: IngressPerAppRequirer is real. on.ready/on.revoked events are plausible and likely real. However, is_ready() method and provide_ingress_requirements(port=...) are likely invented — these method names don't appear in the gold standard and are not confirmed to exist in the library. IngressPerAppReadyEvent and IngressPerAppRevokedEvent event class names are unverified.
